items.title: Evidence of active leaks at roof penetrations
Electrical wiring in attic (splices, junction boxes)
Sill plate and rim joist condition
Dryer vent termination and lint buildup
Site grading and drainage away from foundation
Furnace/air handler type and age (if known)
Flue venting condition for fuel appliances
Gas shutoff and drip leg (if gas)
Access limitations and areas not inspected
